Port A Data

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x0
Size:
0x4
Source:
gpio_rf.rdl

Description

Output values for Port A pins. Each bit drives the corresponding I/O pin when the direction (DDR) is set to Output and the port is in Software mode. Reads back the last value written.

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:0] dr rw 0x0 DR
